query:
SELECT 'tabs' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM tabs t INNER JOIN tables tb ON t.tableId = tb.id WHERE tb.establishmentId = 30001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tabItems' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM tabItems ti INNER JOIN tabs t ON ti.tabId = t.id INNER JOIN tables tb ON t.tableId = tb.id WHERE tb.establishmentId = 30001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orders' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM orders WHERE establishmentId = 30001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orderItems' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM orderItems oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.establishmentId = 30001;
